content:
Member-only story

Razorpay. Full product design interview. 4 rounds.

2 min read
1 hour ago

--

(collected from my sessions and followers)
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Photo by charlesdeluvio on UnsplashHere's exactly what happens in each one.
➤ 𝗥𝗢𝗨𝗡𝗗 𝟭: 𝗣𝗢𝗥𝗧𝗙𝗢𝗟𝗜𝗢 + 𝗧𝗘𝗟𝗘𝗣𝗛𝗢𝗡𝗜𝗖 𝗦𝗖𝗥𝗘𝗘𝗡
A call with a recruiter or design lead to review your work at a high level.
Shorter than you expect. Moves faster than most screeners.
What they're actually testing:
- Can you communicate your work clearly under time pressure?
- Does your portfolio show product thinking or just visual output?
- Do you understand fintech or are you winging it?
➤ 𝗥𝗢𝗨𝗡𝗗 𝟮: 𝗗𝗘𝗦𝗜𝗚𝗡 𝗖𝗛𝗔𝗟𝗟𝗘𝗡𝗚𝗘
A take-home or live problem set in a real-world B2B or fintech context.
Candidates report being asked to redesign or improve an existing product flow.
What they're actually testing:
- Do you ask the right questions before you start?
- Can you design for business users, not just consumers?
- Does your solution show restraint or just effort?
